calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 25, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Peter B. Bother, Esq. represented Plaintiff San Francisco Tennis Club. Stephen Sanders, Title Offier with Land America Financial Group was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. Based on evidence received, the Court orders title be vested on the plaintiff. Order signed.
